name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America is located at 25771 Eight Mile W, Redford Township, MI 48240. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 541 reviews. Call +1 313-531-9047.
description_long:
Advance America was founded in 1997 in Spartanburg, South Carolina, and has grown into one of the largest short-term consumer lenders in the United States. The company operates as Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc., a subsidiary of Purpose Financial, Inc., which is itself owned by Grupo Elektra, S.A.B. de C.V. — the Mexican retail and financial conglomerate that acquired Advance America in 2012 for approximately $780 million. The company is licensed state-by-state as a non-bank lender, operating in compliance with each state's consumer protection and usury laws. It has earned a Great Place to Work® certification and was recognized by Newsweek as one of America's Greatest Workplaces for Women (2025) and for Parents & Families (2024).

Advance America's flagship product is the payday loan — short-term, small-dollar loans from $100 to $1,800 with typical fees of approximately $15 per $100 borrowed, translating to APRs of roughly 350% to 700% depending on state. Beyond payday loans, the company offers installment loans from $100 to $5,000 (APR ~100%–400%), vehicle title loans up to $25,000, and revolving lines of credit up to $4,000. In-store locations also provide check cashing, Western Union money transfers, and Visa prepaid cards. Approval requirements are deliberately minimal — no strong credit score is required, with eligibility based primarily on income and an active bank account.

With 800 to 1,200+ physical store locations nationwide and an online platform serving customers in 27 states, Advance America offers reach and convenience that few competitors match in this lending segment. In-store applicants can receive cash in as little as 30 minutes; online applicants approved before noon may receive same-day funding. The company holds a BBB A+ rating, achieved full BBB accreditation in 2024, and carries a Trustpilot "Excellent" rating of 4.9/5 — reflecting broadly positive feedback from borrowers who prioritize speed and accessibility over cost.

Advance America is a legitimate, licensed lender, but borrowers should enter with clear expectations. The APRs on payday loans are extremely high by design — these are emergency bridge products, not long-term financing tools, and the category carries well-documented risks of debt cycling if loans roll over repeatedly. The company has accumulated 302 BBB complaints over three years and 1,066 CFPB complaints since 2013, and its BBB consumer review score of 1.7/5 (based on ~154 reviews) stands in stark contrast to its A+ accreditation grade. Advance America is genuinely useful for someone facing a cash emergency with no short-term alternatives, but consumers who can qualify for a credit union payday alternative loan, a 0% intro APR credit card, or a bank overdraft line will find significantly cheaper options elsewhere.
address: 25771 Eight Mile W, Redford Township, MI 48240

pricing.guarantee_details: No standard money-back guarantee. In some states, a partial fee refund may apply if the loan is paid off early. Eligibility is entirely state-law dependent. Call (844) 562-6480 for state-specific details.

tiers.name: Payday Loan
features: Repay in full on your next payday
Same-day online funding if approved before noon

tiers.name: Installment Loan
features: More manageable payments than single-payment payday loans

tiers.name: Line of Credit
features: Draw funds as needed up to your limit

certifications: Newsweek America's Greatest Workplaces for Women 2025
Newsweek America's Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families 2024
State-licensed non-bank lender (operates per individual state consumer lending laws)

pros: Founded in 1997 — nearly 30 years operating as a licensed payday and short-term lender
800–1,200+ physical store locations nationwide for walk-in same-day cash access
In-store loan disbursement in as little as 30 minutes after approval
Online funding available same-day for applications approved before noon
BBB A+ rating with full BBB accreditation achieved in 2024
Trustpilot 'Excellent' rating of 4.9/5 reflecting strong borrower satisfaction with speed and process
Multiple product types — payday, installment, title, and lines of credit — in one lender
cons: Payday loan APRs of ~350%–700% are among the highest costs of any consumer credit product
BBB consumer review score is only 1.7/5 (~154 reviews) despite the A+ accreditation grade
1,066 CFPB complaints filed since 2013 and 302 BBB complaints in the last three years
Online lending limited to 27 states — not available nationwide without a physical store nearby
Short repayment windows on payday loans create real risk of repeat borrowing and debt cycling
best_for: Consumers facing a financial emergency who need $100–$1,800 in cash within hours
Borrowers with poor or limited credit history who cannot qualify for a bank loan or credit card
Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing check cashing or prepaid card services alongside a loan
People needing up to $5,000 with structured repayment via an installment loan and no strong credit requirement
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers in genuine short-term financial emergencies — specifically those who have no access to cheaper credit and need cash in hours, not days. The main caveat is cost: APRs of 350%–700% on payday loans make this an expensive last resort, and the 1,066 CFPB complaints and 1.7/5 BBB consumer score signal that disputes and dissatisfaction are common once borrowers encounter fees or rollover situations.
services: Lines of Credit / Cash Advances (revolving, up to $4,000)
Online Account Portal (apply, make payments, manage account at advanceamerica.net)
Customer service support Mon–Fri 8am–9pm EST, Sat 9am–6pm EST
